name: Calvary Baptist Church
description: Calvary Baptist Church is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Lexington, KY. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. A membership is required to play.

name: C.m. Gatton Beaumont YMCA
description: C.m. Gatton Beaumont YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Lexington, KY. There are 4 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Reservations are not available. Players have access to water, restrooms, and locker rooms.

name: High Street YMCA
description: High Street YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Lexington, KY. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts can be reserved. A membership is required to play.

name: Idle Hour Park
description: Idle Hour Park is a place to play pickleball in Lexington, KY. There is 1 outdoor hard court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. The court is free.

name: Kirklevington Park
description: Kirklevington Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Lexington, KY. There are 12 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms and lights. The courts are free.

name: Lexington Senior Center
description: 1 outdoor court and 1 partial court. Senior citizens have priority on use during the day. Restrooms and water available at the Senior Center during business hours (9 am - 5 pm, weekdays). Lessons offered through the Senior Center.

name: Maximus
description: Come play pickleball at Maximus in Lexington Manor, KY! There is 1 outdoor court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The court is private.

name: North Lexington Family YMCA
description: North Lexington Family YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Lexington, KY. There are 12 wood and acrylic courts. 10 are outdoors and 2 are indoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Players have access to restrooms, locker rooms, and water. Reservations are not available.

name: Pickleball Kingdom Lexington Commons
description: Pickleball Kingdom Lexington Commons is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Lexington, KY. There are 17 indoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts can be reserved. Amenities include restrooms, water, lights, a pro shop or equipment store, locker rooms, youth programming, adaptive programming, and trainers or lessons. A one-time fee is required to play.
fees: Fee required — Don't need to be member to play at this location.  Book a Court or Play in Our Open play and pay Non-Member Rate

name: Pickleball Paddock
description: Pickleball Paddock is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Lexington, KY. There are 9 indoor acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms, water, lights, a pro shop or equipment store, trainers or lessons, wheelchair accessibility, and adaptive programming. A membership is required to play. Reservations are available.
fees: Members only — You can also sign up for a visitor membership at Pickleballpaddock.com

name: PKL LEX
description: PKL LEX is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Lexington, KY. There are 9 indoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms and food. A one-time fee is required to play. The courts can be reserved.
fees: Fee required — Court rental fee required to reserve/play on courts. They offer a membership for reduced rental fee cost.

name: St. Luke Church Lexington
description: Courts are first come, first serve and is only open 1:30pm - 4:30pm. Players at St. Luke have a modified game that can allow up to 6 players per court so we can host up to 18 at a time.
